rule.title: Useless null check
rule.description: Checking whether an expression is null when that expression cannot possibly be null is useless.

message.text: This check is useless. o cannot be null at this check, since it is guarded by instanceof.
message.markdown: This check is useless. [o](java/UselessNullCheck.java#L9C4-L9C18) cannot be null at this check, since it is guarded by [...instanceof...](java/UselessNullCheck.java#L7C13-L7C25).
